ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the startup receiving the investment */,
  "industry_vertical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry vertical of the startup */,
  "sub_vertical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-vertical of the startup */,
  "city_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city location of the startup */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investor making the investment */,
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of investment */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment was made */,
  "amount_usd" REAL /* Amount of the investment in USD */,
  "valuation_usd" REAL /* Valuation of the startup at the time of investment */,
  "equity_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of equity the investor receives */,
  "investment_round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the investment */,
  "funding_status" TEXT /* Status of the funding */,
  "next_milestone" TEXT /* Next major milestone the startup aims to achieve post-investment */,
  "investment_documents" TEXT /* URL or path to investment documents */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_city_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_location_id") REFERENCES city_locations ("city_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_industry_vertical_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_vertical_id") REFERENCES industry_verticals ("industry_vertical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_sub_vertical_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_vertical_id") REFERENCES sub_verticals ("sub_vertical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_type_id") REFERENCES investment_types ("investment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_startup_id FOREIGN KEY ("startup_id") REFERENCES startups ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "startups" (
  "startup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each startup */,
  "startup_name" TEXT /* Name of the startup */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the startup */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the startup was founded */,
  "founder_names" TEXT /* Names of the founders */,
  "current_valuation_usd" REAL /* Current valuation of the startup */,
  "total_funding_usd" REAL /* Total amount of funding received to date */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Current number of employees */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the startup's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("startup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_verticals" (
  "industry_vertical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry vertical */,
  "industry_vertical_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry vertical */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the industry vertical */,
  "market_size_usd" REAL /* Estimated market size of the industry vertical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_vertical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_verticals" (
  "sub_vertical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-vertical */,
  "sub_vertical_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-vertical */,
  "industry_vertical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry vertical to which the sub-vertical belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the sub-vertical */,
  "market_size_usd" REAL /* Estimated market size of the sub-vertical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_vertical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_locations" (
  "city_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city location */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate of the city */,
  "investment_friendly_environment" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the city is investment-friendly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the investor was founded */,
  "total_invested_usd" REAL /* Total amount of money the investor has invested */,
  "number_of_investments" INTEGER /* Total number of investments the investor has made */,
  "investment_focus" TEXT /* Primary focus areas of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_types" (
  "investment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment type */,
  "investment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the investment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment trend */,
  "industry_vertical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry vertical */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the trend analysis */,
  "total_investment_usd" REAL /* Total amount of investment in USD */,
  "number_of_investments" INTEGER /* Number of investments made */,
  "average_investment_usd" REAL /* Average amount of investment per deal */,
  "top_investors" TEXT /* List of top investors in the trend */,
  "top_startups" TEXT /* List of top startups in the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_trends_industry_vertical_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_vertical_id") REFERENCES industry_verticals ("industry_vertical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_logged_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the investment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the investment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_investment_id FOREIGN KEY ("investment_id") REFERENCES investments ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, market analysis) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "industry_vertical_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry vertical to monitor */,
  "min_amount_usd" REAL /* Minimum amount of investment in USD to trigger the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, notification) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be triggered (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to be sent when the alert is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_alerts_industry_vertical_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_vertical_id") REFERENCES industry_verticals ("industry_vertical_id")
)
